title: vicia amphicarpa f. paui
intro: Vicia amphicarpa f. paui, also known as Paui's vetch, is a subspecies of Vicia amphicarpa, a plant species in the legume family. It is a perennial herb native to the Iberian Peninsula, known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is used to treat various health issues, such as arthritis, digestive problems, and respiratory conditions, due to its flavonoids and alkaloids content. It can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine as a poultice or salve for topical applications.
